fa-baby-carriage.appearanceId: four-wheeled pram with curved hood and basket body; wheeled infant carriage with rounded canopy
fa-baby-carriage.functionalityId: navigates to a baby or infant product category; opens baby gear or stroller listings
fa-baby-carriage.intentId: find products or information for newborns and infants; browse baby transportation equipment

fa-backpack.appearanceId: rectangular bag with two shoulder straps and a front pocket; rucksack silhouette with carry straps and zipper pouch
fa-backpack.functionalityId: opens a school supplies or travel gear section; accesses bag or luggage category
fa-backpack.intentId: browse backpacks or travel accessories; find student or hiking gear

fa-backspace.appearanceId: wide left-pointing arrow key with an X inside; horizontal arrow with notched left tail and enclosed cross mark
fa-backspace.functionalityId: deletes the character to the left of the cursor; erases the last typed input character
fa-backspace.intentId: correct a typing mistake by removing the previous character; clear recently entered text

fa-backward.appearanceId: two left-pointing filled triangles side by side; double chevron pointing left
fa-backward.functionalityId: rewinds or skips backward in media playback; seeks to an earlier position in the timeline
fa-backward.intentId: go back in audio or video content; replay a portion of media

fa-backward-fast.appearanceId: two left-pointing triangles beside a vertical bar on the left; fast-rewind symbol with a stop boundary
fa-backward-fast.functionalityId: jumps to the beginning of media or the previous track; fast-rewinds to the start
fa-backward-fast.intentId: restart media from the beginning; skip back to the first position

fa-backward-step.appearanceId: single left-pointing triangle with a vertical bar on its left side; step-back arrow with a boundary line
fa-backward-step.functionalityId: skips to the previous track or chapter; steps back one item in the playlist
fa-backward-step.intentId: go to the previous song, video, or section; navigate backward one step in a sequence

fa-bacon.appearanceId: wavy horizontal strip with irregular undulating edges; curvy meat rasher silhouette
fa-bacon.functionalityId: adds a bacon topping or ingredient option; selects bacon as a food item
fa-bacon.intentId: customize a food order with bacon; browse breakfast or meat food items

fa-bacteria.appearanceId: multiple small oval cells with short radiating spike lines; cluster of microorganism shapes with flagella
fa-bacteria.functionalityId: indicates microbial contamination or biological content; opens a health or science information section
fa-bacteria.intentId: learn about bacterial infection or microbiology; access health warning or sanitation information

fa-bacterium.appearanceId: single oval cell body with protruding spike lines; lone microorganism shape with outward flagella
fa-bacterium.functionalityId: represents a single bacterial entity or biological hazard; opens microorganism detail or health content
fa-bacterium.intentId: view information about a specific bacterium; access biology or infection-related content

fa-badge.appearanceId: multi-sided shield or scalloped-edge medallion shape; rounded polygon badge outline
fa-badge.functionalityId: displays a status label, award, or certification marker; applies a badge or tag to an item
fa-badge.intentId: indicate a special status, rank, or achievement; highlight a certified or featured item

fa-badge-check.appearanceId: scalloped-edge badge shape with a checkmark inside; multi-point medallion containing a tick mark
fa-badge-check.functionalityId: marks an item as verified or officially approved; applies a verified badge to a profile or listing
fa-badge-check.intentId: confirm that something meets quality or authenticity standards; indicate trusted or certified status

fa-badge-dollar.appearanceId: scalloped-edge badge shape with a dollar sign inside; multi-point medallion containing a currency symbol
fa-badge-dollar.functionalityId: applies a pricing badge or cost indicator; marks an item with a monetary label
fa-badge-dollar.intentId: highlight a deal, discount, or price offer; show that an item has a monetary value or sale

fa-badge-percent.appearanceId: scalloped-edge badge shape with a percent sign inside; multi-point medallion containing a percentage symbol
fa-badge-percent.functionalityId: applies a discount or sale percentage badge; marks an item with a promotional rate
fa-badge-percent.intentId: indicate a sale or percentage-off promotion; draw attention to a discounted price

fa-badge-sheriff.appearanceId: six-pointed star badge shape; star-shaped law enforcement badge outline
fa-badge-sheriff.functionalityId: designates an authority figure, moderator, or official role; assigns a sheriff or admin badge
fa-badge-sheriff.intentId: identify a person with elevated permissions or authority; mark a community moderator or official

fa-badger-honey.appearanceId: small wide-bodied animal with a broad flat head and stocky legs; low-slung mammal silhouette with thick neck
fa-badger-honey.functionalityId: represents a badger mascot or wildlife category; opens animal or nature content
fa-badger-honey.intentId: access wildlife or nature-themed content; find mascot or animal-related material

fa-badminton.appearanceId: racket with an oval string head beside a shuttlecock; sports paddle and feathered birdie together
fa-badminton.functionalityId: opens a badminton or racquet sports section; selects badminton as a sport category
fa-badminton.intentId: find badminton equipment, courts, or events; browse racquet sports activities

fa-bag-seedling.appearanceId: shopping bag shape with a small sprouting plant on the front; rounded bag outline containing a seedling stem
fa-bag-seedling.functionalityId: opens an eco-friendly or garden product shop; accesses a sustainable or plant-based shopping section
fa-bag-seedling.intentId: shop for organic or environmentally friendly products; browse garden supplies or plant items

fa-bag-shopping.appearanceId: rounded shopping bag with loop handles at the top; tote bag silhouette with two short carry handles
fa-bag-shopping.functionalityId: opens the shopping cart or bag; proceeds to a retail checkout area
fa-bag-shopping.intentId: view or manage items added to a shopping bag; begin the purchase checkout process

fa-bag-shopping-minus.appearanceId: shopping bag with a minus sign on its body; tote bag shape containing a subtraction symbol
fa-bag-shopping-minus.functionalityId: removes an item from the shopping bag; decreases the cart quantity by one
fa-bag-shopping-minus.intentId: reduce the number of items in the cart; undo an accidental addition to the bag

fa-bag-shopping-plus.appearanceId: shopping bag with a plus sign on its body; tote bag shape containing an addition symbol
fa-bag-shopping-plus.functionalityId: adds an item to the shopping bag; increases the cart quantity by one
fa-bag-shopping-plus.intentId: put a product into the cart for purchase; add another unit of an item to the bag

fa-bagel.appearanceId: thick ring-shaped bread with a central hole; circular toroidal baked good outline
fa-bagel.functionalityId: selects a bagel food item or breakfast option; adds a bagel to a food order
fa-bagel.intentId: order or browse bagel and bakery items; choose a breakfast food option

fa-bags-shopping.appearanceId: two overlapping shopping bags with loop handles; double bag silhouettes with carry handles
fa-bags-shopping.functionalityId: opens a retail or multi-bag shopping section; views combined purchase items across bags
fa-bags-shopping.intentId: manage multiple shopping bags or a bulk order; access a broader shopping or retail section

fa-baguette.appearanceId: long diagonal loaf shape with scored diagonal lines on top; elongated bread stick with slash marks
fa-baguette.functionalityId: selects a baguette or bakery item; adds bread to a food order
fa-baguette.intentId: order or browse French bread and bakery products; find a bread or baked goods category

fa-bahai.appearanceId: nine-pointed star with radiating triangular points; star polygon with nine symmetrical arms
fa-bahai.functionalityId: represents the Bahai faith or spiritual symbol; navigates to a religion or spirituality section
fa-bahai.intentId: identify Bahai religious content or community; access interfaith or spiritual resources

fa-baht-sign.appearanceId: capital B letter with two horizontal lines through the vertical stroke; Thai currency glyph with double crossbar
fa-baht-sign.functionalityId: displays or enters a Thai baht currency value; converts or formats amounts in baht
fa-baht-sign.intentId: indicate a price or amount in Thai baht; select Thai baht as the currency

fa-balance-scale.appearanceId: horizontal beam balanced on a central pillar with two hanging pans; classic scales of justice silhouette
fa-balance-scale.functionalityId: opens a comparison or legal content section; accesses fairness, legal, or weighing features
fa-balance-scale.intentId: compare two options or values side by side; navigate to legal or compliance information

fa-balance-scale-right.appearanceId: tilted balance beam with the right pan lower than the left; scales of justice tipped to the right side
fa-balance-scale-right.functionalityId: indicates a right-weighted comparison or imbalance; shows a decision favoring the right option
fa-balance-scale-right.intentId: compare two items with a preference for the right; indicate a skewed or unequal evaluation

fa-ball-pile.appearanceId: several circles stacked in a triangular pile formation; cluster of round balls arranged in a pyramid shape
fa-ball-pile.functionalityId: opens a sports equipment or ball category; represents multiple items grouped together
fa-ball-pile.intentId: browse sports balls or recreational equipment; view a collection of grouped round items

fa-balloon.appearanceId: round inflated sphere with a small tied knot at the bottom; single party balloon with a string end
fa-balloon.functionalityId: marks a celebration, birthday, or festive event; adds a party decoration element
fa-balloon.intentId: indicate a celebration, birthday, or special occasion; decorate or theme content as festive

fa-balloons.appearanceId: two or more round balloons clustered with strings; multiple party balloons tied together in a bunch
fa-balloons.functionalityId: marks a party or celebration section; adds multiple balloon decorations to an event
fa-balloons.intentId: indicate a group celebration or party theme; access festive event decoration options

fa-ballot.appearanceId: rectangular form with several small square checkboxes and lines; document with checkbox list items
fa-ballot.functionalityId: opens a voting form or survey with checkboxes; submits a ballot or multi-option questionnaire
fa-ballot.intentId: cast a vote or complete a polling form; fill out a survey with checkbox selections

fa-ballot-check.appearanceId: rectangular form with checkboxes where one has a checkmark; document with a checked ballot item
fa-ballot-check.functionalityId: confirms a completed or submitted vote; marks a ballot as checked and accepted
fa-ballot-check.intentId: verify a vote has been cast and recorded; confirm a completed survey or election response

fa-ban.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal line crossing through it; prohibition symbol with a crossed-out center
fa-ban.functionalityId: blocks, bans, or disables a user or item; applies a restriction or prohibition to content
fa-ban.intentId: prevent access or usage of a feature; remove or block a person from a platform

fa-ban-parking.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal slash over a bold letter P; no-parking prohibition symbol
fa-ban-parking.functionalityId: marks a zone as no-parking; restricts or removes parking permission
fa-ban-parking.intentId: indicate that parking is not allowed in an area; enforce a no-parking rule

fa-ban-smoking.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal slash over a cigarette shape; no-smoking prohibition symbol
fa-ban-smoking.functionalityId: designates a smoke-free area or policy; blocks smoking in a specified zone
fa-ban-smoking.intentId: indicate a no-smoking rule or environment; enforce a tobacco-free policy

fa-banana.appearanceId: curved elongated fruit with a pointed tip and stalk end; crescent-shaped banana silhouette
fa-banana.functionalityId: selects a banana or tropical fruit item; adds a fruit to a food order or health tracker
fa-banana.intentId: browse fruit or healthy food options; log or select a banana as a dietary item

fa-bandage.appearanceId: rectangular adhesive strip with a padded center panel and dotted edges; band-aid plaster shape
fa-bandage.functionalityId: opens a first aid or wound care section; applies a fix or patch to an issue
fa-bandage.intentId: access health or first aid information; indicate a quick repair or temporary fix

fa-bangladeshi-taka-sign.appearanceId: stylized cursive T-like currency glyph with a crossbar; Bengali taka currency symbol shape
fa-bangladeshi-taka-sign.functionalityId: displays or enters a Bangladeshi taka amount; selects taka as the currency format
fa-bangladeshi-taka-sign.intentId: indicate a price or value in Bangladeshi taka; set currency to Bangladeshi taka

fa-banjo.appearanceId: round drum body with a long thin neck and tuning pegs; circular-bodied stringed instrument silhouette
fa-banjo.functionalityId: opens a music or folk instrument section; represents bluegrass or country music content
fa-banjo.intentId: browse folk or string instrument options; access bluegrass or Americana music features

fa-bank.appearanceId: columned building facade with a triangular pediment roof; classical institution building with pillars
fa-bank.functionalityId: opens banking or financial services section; navigates to account or money management
fa-bank.intentId: access bank account details or financial tools; manage money, transfers, or financial records

fa-bar-chart.appearanceId: several vertical rectangles of varying heights aligned to a baseline; vertical bar graph with multiple columns
fa-bar-chart.functionalityId: opens a data analytics or statistics view; displays a bar chart for comparative data
fa-bar-chart.intentId: visualize and compare data values across categories; analyze performance metrics in chart form

fa-barcode.appearanceId: series of vertical lines of varying widths with numbers below; standard linear barcode pattern
fa-barcode.functionalityId: scans or generates a product barcode; looks up an item by its barcode identifier
fa-barcode.intentId: identify a product by scanning its barcode; retrieve item information from a code

fa-barcode-alt.appearanceId: grid of small squares arranged in a pattern like a QR code; square matrix barcode with data blocks
fa-barcode-alt.functionalityId: scans or generates a 2D matrix barcode; reads an alternative code format for item lookup
fa-barcode-alt.intentId: scan a QR-style code to retrieve product or link data; use a 2D barcode for identification

fa-barcode-read.appearanceId: barcode with a horizontal scan line passing through it; linear barcode being actively scanned
fa-barcode-read.functionalityId: initiates a barcode scan action; reads a barcode to retrieve linked data
fa-barcode-read.intentId: scan a product barcode to get item details; identify an item via its barcode scan

fa-barcode-scan.appearanceId: rectangular barcode inside a viewfinder frame with corner brackets; barcode centered in a targeting frame
fa-barcode-scan.functionalityId: activates the barcode scanner or camera reader; captures a barcode within a scanning frame
fa-barcode-scan.intentId: use the device camera to scan and decode a barcode; look up a product or item by scanning

fa-bars.appearanceId: three horizontal parallel lines of equal length stacked vertically; hamburger menu line pattern
fa-bars.functionalityId: opens or toggles a navigation menu or sidebar; expands a hidden menu of options
fa-bars.intentId: access the main navigation or application menu; reveal additional app sections or settings

fa-bars-filter.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of decreasing length stacked vertically; funnel-like stacked bars narrowing downward
fa-bars-filter.functionalityId: opens filter or sort options for a list; applies filtering criteria to narrow results
fa-bars-filter.intentId: narrow down a list by applying filters; refine search results with sorting or filter controls

fa-bars-sort.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length with a sort arrow beside them; stacked bars with a directional sort indicator
fa-bars-sort.functionalityId: sorts a list or dataset in ascending or descending order; changes the sort order of displayed items
fa-bars-sort.intentId: reorder a list to find items more easily; organize data by a specific sort criterion
